## [00:00 - 02:56]

Hi, this is Don Cruthill. Let's talk about key elements for webinar success. This entire program is about the key things you need to do to build an amazing webinar funnel. But behind these steps, there are a few basic elements that make all the difference in the world. The first one is passion. Hopefully, you've got a passion for your subject matter and for truly serving the people that will show up to your webinar and a passion for your product because that definitely comes through in everything you do associated with your webinar. The next key element is determination. Determination. So I hate to say this, but you're very likely going to fail right out of the gate. Your very first webinar that you're going to do after doing this may not do as well as you'd like it to. And a few times after that, it's those who are determined to get up and do it again who will succeed in this process. This is a new skill, an altered thinking process, a group of advanced psychologies, a group, a set of applied technologies. So you've got advanced psychology you're working in and you're using a set of different technologies and you don't develop any of these things overnight. So you've got to have some determination to make this work. Next is focus. This is not a single element strategy. So I'm not giving you here a single solution. Make this one change to every page on your website and you'll rock it to the top of Google overnight and suddenly get millions of visitors. So yes, you have to nail the webinar, but the real power of a webinar is in executing all the elements of the funnel that surrounds that. And you need to be willing and able to focus on each element of that webinar funnel. So every one of the emails, every one of the pages, the entire process all the way through and get that done very well, then move on to the next thing on that list. And I'll tell you, it takes work, but it's definitely worth it. And of course, to be able to succeed, you've got to have a product, an understanding of your audience's needs, a deadline and a willingness to actually close your cart. And we'll talk more about that as we go along. You got to have an appealing offer, you got to have a set of compelling proofs ideally, and a price point that makes it all worthwhile. You combine all of these elements together, and you've got yourself the makings of an amazing webinar.
